auth.label: API Key
auth.description: DataScope API key sent with the Authorization header. Find it in the DataScope API setup guide: https://help.mydatascope.com/en/articles/9628405-datascope-api

actions.name: create_list_element
actions.description: Create one DataScope metadata list element under a metadata list type.

metadataType.description: The metadata list type that will own the new element.

code.description: The code to store on the new metadata list element.

name.description: The display name of the new metadata list element.

description.description: The description to store on the metadata list element.

attribute1.description: The first custom attribute to store on the element.

attribute2.description: The second custom attribute to store on the element.

id.description: The unique identifier of the metadata list element.

metadataType.description: The metadata list type that owns this element.

code.description: The list element code returned by DataScope.

name.description: The list element name returned by DataScope.

description.description: The list element description returned by DataScope.

attribute1.description: The first custom attribute returned by DataScope.

attribute2.description: The second custom attribute returned by DataScope.

listId.description: The parent list identifier returned by DataScope.

accountId.description: The account identifier returned by DataScope.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp returned by DataScope.

updatedAt.description: The last-updated timestamp returned by DataScope.

element.description: One normalized DataScope metadata list element.

actions.name: create_location
actions.description: Create a DataScope location using the official locations endpoint.

code.description: The location code to store in DataScope.

name.description: The location name to store in DataScope.

description.description: The location description to store in DataScope.

address.description: The location address to store in DataScope.

city.description: The city to store in DataScope.

country.description: The country to store in DataScope.

region.description: The region to store in DataScope.

latitude.description: The latitude to store in DataScope.

longitude.description: The longitude to store in DataScope.

phone.description: The phone number to store in DataScope.

email.description: The contact email to store in DataScope.

companyCode.description: The company code to store in DataScope.

companyName.description: The company name to store in DataScope.

id.description: The unique identifier of the DataScope location.

code.description: The location code returned by DataScope.

name.description: The location name returned by DataScope.

description.description: The location description returned by DataScope.

address.description: The location address returned by DataScope.

phone.description: The phone number returned by DataScope.

email.description: The contact email returned by DataScope.

companyCode.description: The company code returned by DataScope.

companyName.description: The company name returned by DataScope.

actions.name: get_list_element
actions.description: Get one DataScope metadata list element by metadata type and element ID.

metadataType.description: The metadata list type that owns the element.

elementId.description: The identifier of the metadata list element to fetch.

id.description: The unique identifier of the metadata list element.

metadataType.description: The metadata list type that owns this element.

code.description: The list element code returned by DataScope.

name.description: The list element name returned by DataScope.

description.description: The list element description returned by DataScope.

attribute1.description: The first custom attribute returned by DataScope.

attribute2.description: The second custom attribute returned by DataScope.

listId.description: The parent list identifier returned by DataScope.

accountId.description: The account identifier returned by DataScope.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp returned by DataScope.

updatedAt.description: The last-updated timestamp returned by DataScope.

element.description: One normalized DataScope metadata list element.

actions.name: list_answers
actions.description: List DataScope answers from the v2 answers endpoint with stable top-level metadata and dynamic answer values grouped under answers.

formId.description: The DataScope form identifier to filter by.

userId.description: The DataScope user identifier to filter by.

locationId.description: The DataScope location identifier to filter by.

startAt.description: The inclusive start timestamp filter sent to DataScope.

endAt.description: The inclusive end timestamp filter sent to DataScope.

dateModified.description: Whether DataScope should filter answers by modified date instead of created date.

limit.description: The maximum number of answers to return. DataScope allows at most 200.

offset.description: The zero-based offset used to fetch the next page.

formAnswerId.description: The unique identifier of the submitted answer.

formCode.description: The public code of the DataScope form.

formName.description: The form name returned by DataScope.

formState.description: The workflow state of the submitted answer.

userName.description: The display name of the user who submitted the answer.

userIdentifier.description: The unique user identifier returned by DataScope, such as an email address.

createdAt.description: The submission timestamp returned by DataScope.

latitude.description: The latitude captured for the answer when available.

longitude.description: The longitude captured for the answer when available.

additionalProperties.description: The raw answer value returned by DataScope.

answers.description: The dynamic answer values keyed by question label or field name.
The normalized answers returned by DataScope.

actions.name: list_answers_with_full_metadata
actions.description: List DataScope answers from the metadata-rich answers endpoint and normalize each question item into a stable questions array.

formId.description: The DataScope form identifier to filter by.

userId.description: The DataScope user identifier to filter by.

locationId.description: The DataScope location identifier to filter by.

startAt.description: The inclusive start timestamp filter sent to DataScope.

endAt.description: The inclusive end timestamp filter sent to DataScope.

formAnswerId.description: The unique identifier of the submitted answer.

formCode.description: The public code of the DataScope form.

formName.description: The form name returned by DataScope.

formState.description: The workflow state of the submitted answer.

userName.description: The display name of the user who submitted the answer.

userIdentifier.description: The unique user identifier returned by DataScope, such as an email address.

createdAt.description: The submission timestamp returned by DataScope.

updatedAt.description: The last-updated timestamp returned by DataScope.

latitude.description: The latitude captured for the answer when available.

longitude.description: The longitude captured for the answer when available.

finished.description: Whether DataScope marks the answer as finished.

anyOf.description: The assignment identifier attached to the answer when available.
The assignment identifier attached to the answer when available.

assignId.description: The assignment identifier attached to the answer when available.

anyOf.description: The internal assignment identifier attached to the answer when available.
The internal assignment identifier attached to the answer when available.

assignInternalId.description: The internal assignment identifier attached to the answer when available.

assignLocationName.description: The assignment location name attached to the answer when available.

assignLocationDescription.description: The assignment location description attached to the answer when available.

assignLocationCode.description: The assignment location code attached to the answer when available.

formId.description: The DataScope form identifier that owns this answer field.

formAnswerId.description: The answer identifier that owns this answer field.

formCode.description: The public code of the DataScope form.

formState.description: The workflow state of the answer.

questionId.description: The unique identifier of the form question.

questionName.description: The visible question label returned by DataScope.

name.description: The internal question name returned by DataScope.

questionValue.description: The raw answer value returned for this question.

questionType.description: The question type returned by DataScope.

subformIndex.description: The 1-based subform item index when present.

metadataType.description: The metadata list type referenced by this question.

metadataId.description: The metadata element identifier referenced by this question.

items.description: One normalized answer item from the metadata-rich DataScope answers endpoint.

questions.description: The normalized question items returned for this answer.

items.description: One normalized DataScope answer with per-question metadata.

answers.description: The normalized answers with per-question metadata.

actions.name: list_list_elements
actions.description: List all elements from one DataScope metadata list type.

metadataType.description: The metadata list type, such as products or customers.

id.description: The unique identifier of the metadata list element.

metadataType.description: The metadata list type that owns this element.

code.description: The list element code returned by DataScope.

name.description: The list element name returned by DataScope.

description.description: The list element description returned by DataScope.

attribute1.description: The first custom attribute returned by DataScope.

attribute2.description: The second custom attribute returned by DataScope.

listId.description: The parent list identifier returned by DataScope.

accountId.description: The account identifier returned by DataScope.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp returned by DataScope.

updatedAt.description: The last-updated timestamp returned by DataScope.

items.description: One normalized DataScope metadata list element.

elements.description: The normalized metadata list elements returned by DataScope.

actions.name: list_locations
actions.description: List DataScope locations available to the authenticated account.

code.description: The location code returned by DataScope.

name.description: The location name returned by DataScope.

description.description: The location description returned by DataScope.

address.description: The location address returned by DataScope.

email.description: The contact email returned by DataScope.

companyCode.description: The company code returned by DataScope.

companyName.description: The company name returned by DataScope.

locations.description: The normalized locations returned by DataScope.
